suggestions.rationale: P0 RED MAIN. Verified one-line test fix (d8b0702cb, 28 tests pass) stranded because strike-pan-2057 is stuck 'running' (PAN-2022) and branch isn't FF. Operator-only (pan kill is flywheel-forbidden): `pan kill strike-pan-2057 && pan strike PAN-2057`.
Deploy landed PAN-2050 fix: `npm run build && pan reload`. Fix is in source (2ec6164c4) but NOT in running dist. pan reload is outside flywheel allowed-actions.

PR #1950 passed but merge_conflict + inherited red-main. Needs rebase after main greens; deacon is no-resume (OVERDECK_NO_RESUME=1) so will NOT auto-rebase — operator rebase or `pan restart --resume`.

openQuestions: P0 RED MAIN: strike-pan-2057 deadlocked (PAN-2022). Operator must `pan kill strike-pan-2057 && pan strike PAN-2057` to land the verified test fix. Flywheel-blocked by design (pan kill is operator-only).

Deacon is OVERDECK_NO_RESUME=1 (since RUN-3). Stopped agents won't revive; conflicting PRs (PAN-1919/2044) won't auto-rebase even after main greens. `pan restart --resume` (operator) unfreezes the review/rebase queue.
PAN-2050 fix is in source but not in dist — pan plan --auto reliability unconfirmed until `npm run build && pan reload`.
require_uat_before_merge=true: MIN-831 + MIN-846 at the human merge gate; PAN-1919/1901/2044 join once main greens.
